query:
-- Create quotations table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotations` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationNumber` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `customerId` INT NOT NULL,
  `customerName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `contactPerson` VARCHAR(100),
  `contactPhone` VARCHAR(50),
  `contactEmail` VARCHAR(255),
  `shippingAddress` TEXT,
  `quotationMode` ENUM('fob_only', 'batch_selection') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'batch_selection',
  `currency` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  `status` ENUM('draft', 'sent', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `totalAmount` DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `validUntil` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `customerNotes` TEXT,
  `version` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `parentQuotationId` INT,
  `convertedToOrderId` INT,
  `convertedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `sentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `sentBy` INT,
  `createdBy` INT NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `deletedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX `quotations_customer_idx` (`customerId`),
  INDEX `quotations_status_idx` (`status`),
  INDEX `quotations_number_idx` (`quotationNumber`),
  INDEX `quotations_valid_until_idx` (`validUntil`),
  INDEX `quotations_created_at_idx` (`createdAt`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`customerId`) REFERENCES `companies`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`parentQuotationId`) REFERENCES `quotations`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`convertedToOrderId`) REFERENCES `orders`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`sentBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);

-- Create quotation_items table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_items` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationId` INT NOT NULL,
  `productId` INT NOT NULL,
  `productName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `productSku` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `fobQuantity` INT,
  `fobUnitPrice` DECIMAL(15, 2),
  `fobSubtotal` DECIMAL(15, 2),
  `sortOrder` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `quotation_items_quotation_idx` (`quotationId`),
  INDEX `quotation_items_product_idx` (`productId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`quotationId`) REFERENCES `quotations`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`productId`) REFERENCES `products`(`id`)
);

-- Create quotation_batches table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_batches` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationItemId` INT NOT NULL,
  `variantId` INT NOT NULL,
  `variantName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` INT NOT NULL,
  `unitPrice` DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `subtotal` DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `sortOrder` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `quotation_batches_item_idx` (`quotationItemId`),
  INDEX `quotation_batches_variant_idx` (`variantId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`quotationItemId`) REFERENCES `quotation_items`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`variantId`) REFERENCES `product_variants`(`id`)
);

-- Add quotation source fields to orders table
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `createdFromQuotationId` INT;
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `createdFromQuotationNumber` VARCHAR(50);

-- Create quotation_items table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_items` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationId` INT NOT NULL,
  `productId` INT NOT NULL,
  `productName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `productSku` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `fobQuantity` INT,
  `fobUnitPrice` DECIMAL(15, 2),
  `fobSubtotal` DECIMAL(15, 2),
  `sortOrder` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `quotation_items_quotation_idx` (`quotationId`),
  INDEX `quotation_items_product_idx` (`productId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`quotationId`) REFERENCES `quotations`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`productId`) REFERENCES `products`(`id`)
);

-- Create quotation_batches table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_batches` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationItemId` INT NOT NULL,
  `variantId` INT NOT NULL,
  `variantName` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` INT NOT NULL,
  `unitPrice` DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `subtotal` DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `sortOrder` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `quotation_batches_item_idx` (`quotationItemId`),
  INDEX `quotation_batches_variant_idx` (`variantId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`quotationItemId`) REFERENCES `quotation_items`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`variantId`) REFERENCES `product_variants`(`id`)
);

-- Add quotation source fields to orders table
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `createdFromQuotationId` INT;
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `createdFromQuotationNumber` VARCHAR(50);
